title: aster × frikartii
intro: Aster × frikartii, also known as Frikart's aster or Frikart's Michaelmas daisy, is a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Aster ericoides and Aster novi-belgii. This flowering plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Aster × frikartii include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Aster × frikartii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried flowers in hot water or mixing them with a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
